releaseNotes:
- Vault-native storytelling: the bundled sample book now ships with a plan vault, and the IDE surfaces a searchable Vault Graph with findings and deep links
- F Studio now includes an embedded live monitor that follows the editing caret and uses the same player path as Preview
- Workshop asset production is faster and clearer, with direct image regeneration, per-phase progress, raw-render previews, enlarged thumbnails, and asset version history
- Lunaverse Agent now ships with asset-production MCP tools and starter prompts so new sessions begin with the right production context
- The IDE now uses a single hard login gate and unified account surface across Agent, Workshop, Preview, and publishing flows
- Update notifications now show the from-to version jump before restart
releaseNotesZh:
- Vault 原生创作：内置样板书现在带计划 Vault，IDE 可打开可搜索的 Vault Graph，并显示问题提示与深链跳转
- F Studio 新增内嵌实时监看，随编辑光标联动，并与 Preview 使用同一播放器链路
- Workshop 素材生产更快也更透明：直接图片重生、分阶段进度、原始渲染预览、缩略图放大与素材版本历史
- Lunaverse Agent 内置素材生产 MCP 工具与开场提示，新会话会自动带上正确的生产上下文
- IDE 现在使用统一的强登录入口与账号界面，覆盖 Agent、Workshop、Preview 与发布流程
- 更新提示现在会显示从旧版本到新版本的版本跳转
